channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned bike frame, 15th April
item.description:
Been here for months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing road name sign, 15th April
item.description:
Hook Lane road name sign Reported over 6 months ago Marked as resolved Sign never installed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 15th April
item.description:
Unauthorised dumping of furniture blocking shop entrance.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish- bed and further down large bag full of wood., 15th April
item.description:
As ever there is a problem on Worsley Bridge Road so it gets tiresome having to constantly report this problem. As a street friend I had a litter pick up this morning but it is an endless job to keep this road clear. There are no houses overlooking the dumping grounds at the Lower Sydenham end of this road only sports fields. I have repeatedly requested you contact both Kent County Cricket and Crystal Palace about the amount of rubbish strewn on the grass verges of this road and Copers Cope. Why can’t you write to them??? They could then get a member of staff to clear up, given the vast amounts spent on both venues some civic responsibilities to the local community would not come amiss.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weston house grass verge pavement side, 15th April
item.description:
Have tried to report this before. There is a grass verge next to pavement and someone has dumped their tree prunings on it. I cannot zoom into this area on map. It either is Brent’s responsibility. If it is Brent’s please remove it. If it belongs to the flats please request them to remove it. Please do try to resolve the matter without simply saying not applicable etc as we no way of sorting it by any means. Thanks for your help

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag ripped - waste scattered across street, 15th April
item.description:
Someone left their black bin liners by the road and a couple have been broken and dragged rubbish all across the road. Could this please be cleaned up. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmdale Terrace, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement spillage on the road, 15th April
item.description:
The cement spillage is near the end of Tilbury Close on the left hand side and has been there since last Friday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Tilbury Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of small pots holes, 15th April
item.description:
Lots of small pot holes along Oak Tree Gardens from the corner of New Street Hill all the way up to Leamington Avenue. Some have been marked with white markings others have not. The ones that have been marked have not been addressed. Please look at the whole patch of this road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oak Tree Gardens, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to the bus stop, 15th April
item.description:
Was walking to the bus stop just come out of Waldrist way and there is a dead cat next to the lamp post.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hailey Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suspected unauthorised business sign nailed into tree, 15th April
item.description:
A business has attached a sign promoting their business to a tree. Quite large 3 foot by 1.5ft estimated size.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Terrace, New Southgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon underneath, 15th April
item.description:
Dead pigeon and wounded and bleeding found and covered w magazines

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Endless flytipping / overflowing rubbish., 15th April
item.description:
Overflowing rubbish. Unhygienic and consistent. Needs to be a permanent solution to the fly tipping and the overflowing bins. Creates loose wrappers / trash being spread including into milfields park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 15th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorbike blocking pavement, 15th April
item.description:
Motorbike parked on pavement under a nylon cover. Blocking the pavement. Outside number 30 Bushberry Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bushberry Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water near footpaths, 15th April
item.description:
The footpath in foots Cray meadows that comes out on St Andrews road has alot of dips at the sides and when it rains they fill with water, and the water starts to build up on the footpath itself, this is used daily by parents and children going to school. Many years ago a pipe was laid under this path as it kept flooding, (is this blocked?) could this be looked into please, before the issue gets worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping bags of rubbish, 15th April
item.description:
There are are around 10 bags of rubbish dumped, more and more bags are being dumped overnight. The fox's have started to rip the bags and making a mess on the pavement and Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked vehicle on Chase Side, 15th April
item.description:
Car parked on pavement on Chase Side

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bin and rubbish in tree copse, 15th April
item.description:
A rubbish bin has been dragged into the small copse of trees closest to the Burnt Oak Lane gate and set on fire. There is burnt rubbish everywhere and destroyed bin and rubbish in the trees. It's a hazard to young children wishing to play, dogs being walked and wildlife. There is also a lot of broken glass in the middle of the park. Locals have tried to remove as much as possible as one dog has already suffered injury to it's feet.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137A, Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long pothole on Dorchester AVE, outside 22-26, 15th April
item.description:
Large long and getting wider pothole in middle of the road outside 24-26 Dorchester. Needs looking at.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Dorchester Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Very Large sacks full of black bags fly tipped, 15th April
item.description:
Two Very Large sacks full of black bags along with 3 x mirrors have fly tipped on the grass area near the fence line. This issue was first reported on 8th March. The job was automatically closed on 10th April and the rubbish is still there on the evening of 14/04/26. Please attend and assess. Thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charles Grinling Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
